title: E Line Opening
description: The E Line (Expo) opened between 7th/Metro Center and Culver City, LA Metro's first new light rail line in over a decade.

title: L Line Azusa Extension
description: The L Line (Gold) extended from Azusa Avenue to Downtown Azusa and APU/Citrus College, adding six new stations in the San Gabriel Valley.

title: E Line Extended to Santa Monica
description: The E Line (Expo) extended from Culver City to Downtown Santa Monica, completing the full Expo Line corridor from downtown LA to the coast.

title: COVID-19 Service Reductions
description: LA Metro reduced service system-wide in response to the COVID-19 pandemic. Ridership dropped dramatically and recovery has been gradual.

title: K Line Opening
description: The K Line (Crenshaw/LAX) opened between Expo/Crenshaw and Westchester/Veterans stations, serving the Crenshaw corridor and Inglewood.

title: Regional Connector Opening
description: The Regional Connector linked the A, C, E, and L lines through a new downtown tunnel, creating through-running service and eliminating transfers at 7th/Metro. Ridership figures for these lines were significantly restructured as a result.

title: D Line Section 1 Extension
description: The D Line (Purple) extended westward from Wilshire/Western to three new Westside stations: Wilshire/La Brea, Wilshire/Fairfax, and Wilshire/La Cienega.
